detail: Derived: $0.02 per touch / (reply_rate * qualify_rate). At 12% reply * 50% qualify = 6% => $0.02/0.06 = $0.33. At 7% reply * 50% qualify = 3.5% => $0.02/0.035 = $0.57
Tenacious CFO interview, challenge brief. Stalled-deal rate benchmark cited in baseline_numbers.md
14 interactions in act2_thread.json for syn001 (Verdant Labs), all sent=true, final_stage=qualified. Generated by scripts/run_act2_demo.py
data/act2_latency.json: n_interactions=14 (8 cold-email turns for 8 synthetic prospects + 6 thread turns for syn001 simulation)

8 synthetic prospects (syn001-syn008) in act2_latency.json all had funding/layoff/leadership signals from the ODM. 1 live Airbyte run (scripts/run_real_enrichment.py) fell back to generic opener because company was absent from Crunchbase ODM. 8/9 = 88.9%

claim: 1 of 9 (11%) fell back to generic (Airbyte absent from ODM)
detail: Airbyte not found in the 1,000-row Crunchbase ODM sample. Pipeline log: 'No Crunchbase record found - defaulting to segment 1'. Wellfound robots.txt respected; scraper fell back to airbyte.com/careers and scraped 8 real job posts.

claim: 8 real job posts scraped from airbyte.com/careers
detail: Playwright scraper (scraper/job_scraper.py) hit airbyte.com/careers after Wellfound was blocked by robots.txt. Scraped 8 live job postings including 5 engineering roles.
Pricing sheet: 'Weighted average ACV (talent outsourcing): $240K-$720K'. Midpoint = ($240K + $720K) / 2 = $480K
Row: 'Discovery-call-to-proposal conversion: 30-50%'. Using 40% midpoint. Tenacious internal, baseline_numbers.md
Row: 'Proposal-to-close conversion: 20-30%'. Using 30% (top of range). Tenacious internal, baseline_numbers.md
3,000 touches x 8% reply = 240 x 50% qualify = 120 x 30% close = 36 closed deals x $480K ACV = $17.28M ~ $17.3M
6,000 touches x 8% reply = 480 x 50% qualify = 240 x 30% close = 72 closed deals x $480K ACV = $34.56M ~ $34.6M

claim: $69.1M ARR (all four segments: 12,000 touches/yr, 144 closed deals)
detail: 12,000 touches x 8% reply = 960 x 50% qualify = 480 x 30% close = 144 closed deals x $480K ACV = $69.12M ~ $69.1M
$5/week LLM ($0.02/touch x 60 touches x 4 weeks = $4.80 ~ $5/week) + $0 Resend + $0 enrichment = ~$20 total
